summary: Iteration 3 — Surgical bug-fix verification for the 4 user-reported issues. ALL 4 BUGS ARE FIXED. Backend: 8/8 new pytest cases pass (test_bugfixes_iter3.py) covering new youtube_videos & youtube_channel_url fields on /api/site/assets, PATCH /api/admin/site with youtube_videos persistence, and 401/403 role enforcement. Frontend Playwright verified: (#1) 24/24 external _blank links have rel='noopener noreferrer' incl. yt-subscribe; clicking yt-subscribe shows NO COOP/Navigation-blocked errors. (#2) admin sets https://youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ → home reloads → appears AND anchor points to https://youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ. (#3) home page body & PayModal (both logged-out and logged-in) contain NO '30-Day','30-day','Refund Policy','money-back','money back'. (#4) body contains 'vishnuraghav955@gmail.com', NO 'vishnuraghav1204'; mailto = mailto:vishnuraghav955@gmail.com. Admin Panel new testids verified: site-yt-channel, site-yt-add, site-yt-row-{0..2}, site-yt-title-{0..2}, site-yt-url-{0..2}, site-yt-remove-{0..2}. Existing testids (hero-cta-courses, enroll-time-management-mastery, blog-search, nav-getstarted, nav-admin) still functional. Reverted the YT URL change at end of test.
critical_code_review_comments: extractYoutubeId helper in Home.jsx correctly handles watch?v=, youtu.be/, and /shorts/ patterns — verified by setting watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ and seeing the i.ytimg.com/vi/dQw4w9WgXcQ/hqdefault.jpg thumbnail render.

All 24 external <a target=_blank> links across the SPA carry rel='noopener noreferrer'. This includes YouTube subscribe button, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn (where present), Amazon, Flipkart book buy buttons, and the Navbar's YouTube nav button.

PATCH /api/admin/site SiteSettingsIn correctly accepts youtube_videos as List[YouTubeVideoIn]; Pydantic models converted via model_dump() before persistence. Settings persistence verified through GET /api/site/assets after PATCH.
Admin role enforcement on PATCH /admin/site verified: 401 without token, 403 with student token.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 iter3 + earlier 17/17 phase2 + 29/29 iter1 still passing)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 bug-fix scenarios + admin new fields verified)
